description:
Request body for registering a scout config without waiting for the coordinator tick.

Upsert keyed on `skill_name`: if the coordinator (or a concurrent caller) already
registered the row, the provided tunables are applied to it instead.

emit.description: Whether the scout writes findings to the inbox. False = dry-run: it runs and logs but emits nothing. Defaults to true.

enabled.description: Whether this scout runs on its schedule. Defaults to true.

run_cron_schedule.description: Optional five-field cron expression, e.g. '30 9 * * *' (daily at 09:30), '0 9,17 * * *' (twice daily), or '0 9 * * 1-5' (weekday mornings). Evaluated in the project timezone. Takes precedence over `run_interval_minutes`; occurrences must be at least 30 minutes apart.

run_interval_minutes.description: Minutes between runs (30–43200). Defaults to 1440 (every 24 hours).

skill_name.description: The `signals-scout-*` skill to register a config for. The skill must already exist on this project — author it via the skills store first.
